name: Eosmon (Ultimate)
description: An Ultimate-level Eosmon that was born after several of the Eosmon that were created formed a single collective entity as a result of a researcher losing control when things didn't go as planned. It will destroy any obstacle, and act violently just as instructed. It is able to generate new Perfect-level Eosmon from its swollen tail, increasing its subordinates. Its Special Moves are a beam fired from its chest ( Aurora Stream ), slashing the enemy by teleporting ( Cutting Edge ), and enlarging the panels that it protects itself with, causing them to rain down over the enemy, crushing them ( Cruelty Rain ).
